name: Cheesy Chive Blossom Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together eggs, water, salt, pepper, and parsley.
2. Melt butter in a 10-inch omelet pan just until the butter sizzles (don't let it brown). Pour in the egg mixture, shaking the pan immediately.
3. With the flat side of a fork, stir the eggs and move and tilt the pan in a circular motion until the eggs begin to set.
4. Sprinkle chive florets and cheese down the center; allow the cheese to melt slightly.
5. Fold the omelet over and serve immediately.
6. Garnish with whole chive blossoms.
